name: A Tale of Ylang Ylang
original_name: สร้อยสะบันงา
overview: Sroisabunnga was born into an aristocratic family and was taught to be proud of her heritage and blood. However, because her father was accused of being a rebel before his death, Sroi tries to raise herself to the high-class society again in order to restore her family's name and reputation. Her diligence and ambition drive her to be too arrogant — to be someone who will never give in to anyone.

trailers.title: สร้อยสะบันงา เร็วๆ นี้ | Ch3Thailand
